name: Submodel Reuse Demonstration - 5 Clients Excluding 1 Target
description: Demonstrates efficient submodel reuse where 5 clients (clients 0-4) all exclude the same target client (client 0). This should result in only one shared track for the 5 excluding clients, showcasing how the system can reuse submodels when multiple clients have identical disagreement patterns.

expected_tracks.track_c0_c1_c2_c3_c4_no0: Shared track for clients 0, 1, 2, 3, 4 - all excluding client 0
expected_tracks.global: Global track (includes all clients, primary for client 0 who has no exclusions)
